keep_inside_runtime: runner / middleware / deep agent invocation internals
langgraph checkpointer internals and unresolved execution state
temporary workspace state files used only during a live run
current_boundary_risks: legacy progress path已切换到 cache / manifest snapshot，但仍需防止日志目录回退逻辑重新进入主链
structured_result_digest 仍作为兼容摘要保留，必须继续确保 artifact manifest 才是唯一 readiness truth
runtime bootstrap 结果仍会写 explain outputs，lineage 尚未完全并入 task/thread artifact graph；当前主链实现固定在 runtime_bootstrap.py
full_report_service / structured_service 已删除，但对应 compat seam 的 retirement map 和 guard tests 仍需保持同步
rules: 凡离开 agent_runtime 或 deep_report 执行闭包边界的对象，必须进入 schema family
task state、event payload、artifact payload 共享版本化 contract，只允许字段裁剪，不允许类型漂移
compat 字段可以保留，但只能从新 schema 派生，不能继续作为事实源
cache payload 只能保存 snapshot，不得存活 runtime object、runner object、tool object
